calendar.matters:
Petition For Settlement Of Account And Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Bonnie Vaughn. Gregory Jung for Angie Vaughn (Objector).

Counsel agreed that mediation would not resolve the matter and presented oral argument to support their positions/objections with regard to the $15,000.00 payment to Angie as the equivalent to the vehicle that was given to Bonnie, the $1,500.00 customs fine, the Trustee's fees and the property management fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Settlement Of Account And Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Continued To Dec-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Bonnie Vaughan. Gregory Jung for Angie Vaughan (Beneficiary).

Mr. Jung stated that he filed a declaration in support of the request to continue the matter this morning. Ms. Navia stated that she reviewed the declaration, that her Client had no objection to a 30 day continuance and that this was the first they've seen of any evidence of any medical treatment. The matter was continued to December 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Jung will filed his objection by November 19, 2010. The response is due by December 2, 2010.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Settlement Of Account And Approval Of Trustee And Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Continued To Oct-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
